THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARASCH, HERBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, RONALD W. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 559 VALENCIA STREET, #77, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAR-20-2006, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY MAR-20-06, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $270.00 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $19.28 PER DAY FROM JAN-25-06 THROUGH MAR-20-06, ALONG WITH COSTS OF $335.00, AND ATTORNEY FEES OF $700.00, FOR A TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $2,365.40; OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS: PLNTF WILL PAY DFDNT $400.00;IF DFDNT VACATES THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 9:00AM, MAR-20-06.
